mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_inbox WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_inbox ( id, event_id, event_type, source, payload, status, consumed_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{eventId}, #{eventType}, #{source}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS JSON), #{statusCode}, #{consumedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
